title: taraxacum biformatum
intro: Taraxacum biformatum, also known as the Biform dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum biformatum include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to remove excess fluids from the body, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and pain. The health benefits of Taraxacum biformatum include its potential to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum biformatum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in infusions and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
